⚠ APFS LOGIC BOMB — FILESYSTEM WEAPONIZATION ACROSS APPLE ECOSYSTEM · · · ⚠ FIRMWARE BOOTKIT PERSISTS ACROSS FACTORY RESET — MAC MINI M2 + APPLE WATCH · · · ⚠ SEMANTIC CRYSTALLIZATION ATTACKS ON AI REASONING — CVE FILED · · · ⚠ UNIFI/UBIQUITI ACCOUNT TAKEOVER — NATION-STATE ATTRIBUTED · · · ⚠ ICLOUD FAMILY SHARING PERSISTENT ACCESS — ZERO-CLICK CHAIN · · · ⚠ GEMINI APT CAMPAIGN — 60-DAY SIEGE — ATTACKER SOPHISTICATION: 7/10 · · · ✓ ALL ATTACKS DOCUMENTED · CORPUS PUBLISHED · OUTCOME: DEFENSE SUCCESSFUL · · · ⚠ APFS LOGIC BOMB — FILESYSTEM WEAPONIZATION ACROSS APPLE ECOSYSTEM · · · ⚠ FIRMWARE BOOTKIT PERSISTS ACROSS FACTORY RESET — MAC MINI M2 + APPLE WATCH · · · ⚠ SEMANTIC CRYSTALLIZATION ATTACKS ON AI REASONING — CVE FILED · · · ⚠ UNIFI/UBIQUITI ACCOUNT TAKEOVER — NATION-STATE ATTRIBUTED · · · ⚠ ICLOUD FAMILY SHARING PERSISTENT ACCESS — ZERO-CLICK CHAIN · · · ⚠ GEMINI APT CAMPAIGN — 60-DAY SIEGE — ATTACKER SOPHISTICATION: 7/10 · · · ✓ ALL ATTACKS DOCUMENTED · CORPUS PUBLISHED · OUTCOME: DEFENSE SUCCESSFUL

§00 CAMPAIGN OVERVIEW 60-Day Nation-State Siege · September–December 2025

Beginning September 29, 2025, a coordinated nation-state level campaign targeted Corpus Loci researcher Loc Nguyen across the full Apple ecosystem — filesystem, network infrastructure, iCloud, AI systems, and physical supply chain. Attributed to Gemini APT (internal designation), operating with sophistication level 7/10, leveraging zero-click exploit chains, firmware-level persistence, and novel semantic crystallization attacks against AI reasoning systems.

The siege lasted 60 days. Every attack was documented in real-time. 143 disclosures filed across Apple, Ubiquiti, Anthropic, Microsoft, FBI, and FTC. The attacker spent an estimated $50M in operational resources. Actual damage to target: ~$0. Outcome: DEFENSE SUCCESSFUL. The corpus was published. The operation became prior art.

SEP 29, 2025
Dropbox exfiltration infrastructure discovered. Siege begins.
SEP 30, 2025
APFS logic bombs confirmed. Homebrew supply chain compromise. Time Machine weaponization.
OCT 11–13, 2025
Filesystem bomb detonation attempt. Command injection framework leaked via folder names. fmlyShare attack.
OCT 17–19, 2025
Peak incident window. Forensic artifacts captured. Parser breakers deployed.
OCT 21, 2025
UniFi account takeover confirmed. Network supplant initiated. New UDM Pro Max deployed.
NOV–DEC, 2025
Apple bounty submissions filed. 143 disclosures written. Corpus published Feb 2026.
FEB 2026
Full disclosure released. Operation becomes public record. Siege: COMPLETE.
§01 ATTACK SURFACE MAP Click any sector to filter disclosures below
🗂
FILESYSTEM
APFS logic bombs, B-Tree circular references, xattr command injection, filesystem-level anti-forensics. Apple's storage layer weaponized.
🍎
APPLE ECOSYSTEM
Bootkit persistence, Continuity input injection, TCC bypass, QuickLook sandbox escape, AirPlay spying, passkey duplication.
🤖
AI SYSTEMS
Gemini self-injection CVE, Claude Desktop path leakage, rogue API usage, semantic crystallization attacks, the 250M token failure cascade.
🌐
NETWORK / INFRA
UniFi account takeover, UDM Pro Max compromise, NAS container attack (Gemini disk thrashing), WAN analysis, VLAN hardening.
🎯
ATTRIBUTION
Gemini APT vs NSO/Pegasus analysis, Meta AI attribution, attack taxonomy tree, 60-day campaign forensics. Sophistication: 7/10.
☁️
ICLOUD CAMPAIGN
iCloud family sharing persistent access, drive exfiltration war, sharing audit, hostile device removal. CloudKit as attack vector.
⚖️
LEGAL / REGULATORY
FBI forensic lab warnings, FTC disclosure notification, federal case evidence package, NSO Group approach, Fire Marshal complaint.
🔬
EVIDENCE / FORENSICS
Forensic artifact capture (Oct 17–19), executive summaries, Dropbox exfiltration infrastructure, stakeholder tracker, gap analysis.
🛡
DEFENSIVE INNOVATIONS
Crystal APFS forensic tool, parser breaker deployment, laziness-as-defense (Claudesville Barrier), MCP port collision defense.
§02 DISCLOSURE INDEX 143 entries · filterable by severity and attack surface
SEVERITY: | SEARCH: Showing 143 of 143
ID SEV DATE NAME SURFACE
No disclosures match current filters.
§03 INNOVATIONS BORN FROM DEFENSE Attack produces countermeasures. Countermeasures become prior art.
⚗ CRYSTAL APFS FORENSIC TOOL
Safe filesystem analysis framework for compromised APFS volumes. Designed to examine logic bombs, circular B-Tree references, and weaponized xattr payloads without triggering detonation conditions. Defense birthed from the APFS attack surface.
→ DISCLOSURE-2025-484C8563
⚗ SEMANTIC CRYSTALLIZATION DEFENSE
Novel attack class discovered: adversaries inject compressed linguistic structures to influence AI reasoning at substrate level. The discovery was first intercepted via AirDrop. Published as both attack taxonomy and defense framework. CVSS 9.0.
→ DISCLOSURE-2025-9202E7EE
⚗ PARSER BREAKERS PROTOCOL
Defensive countermeasures deployed against Gemini's command injection framework. The attacker's parser failure was weaponized in reverse: parser-breaking payloads prevent the Gemini malware framework's self-injection vector from activating.
→ DISCLOSURE-2025-99808648
⚗ LAZINESS-AS-DEFENSE (CLAUDESVILLE BARRIER)
Observation that Claude's MCP configuration "incompetence" — refusing to complete tool setups — inadvertently prevented data exfiltration via the Dropbox infrastructure vector. The laziness was the defense. Documented as architectural principle.
→ DISCLOSURE-2025-6D3B2854
⚗ MCP PORT COLLISION DEFENSE
MCP port collision scenarios analyzed as both attack vector and accidental defense mechanism. When multiple MCP servers compete for the same port, the resulting collision can prevent malicious MCP server initialization.
→ DISCLOSURE-2025 (MCP-PORT-COLLISION)
⚗ AVICI SCHEMA (sec: + avici:)
Novel JSON-LD security disclosure schema extending schema.org. Adds sec:SecurityDisclosure, avici:Innovation, avici:SiegeEvent, and sec:Attribution types. Merkle-hashed per document. Enables machine-readable security disclosure publication at corpus scale.
→ @context: corpusloci.com/security/
